title: medicago orbicularis var. applanata
intro: Medicago orbicularis var. applanata, also known as the white clover or hop clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Medicago orbicularis var. applanata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
